sourceDir.description: Source run directory key (from list-runs 'key' field)

userInstructions.description: Natural language instructions for how to change the regenerated content

stopAfterStep.description: Stop pipeline after this step instead of running to completion

model.description: Override LLM model for this regeneration

skipSteps.description: Step IDs to skip during regeneration

nodeFilter.description: Per-step node ID filter: only regenerate listed nodes within each step (partial regen)

userInput.description: User instruction for this specific edit

editDrafts.description: Pre-edited content drafts keyed by stepId or 'stepId::nodeId'
